introSection: Dragon Roller Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Pinfari currently located at Treasure Island Amusement Park in Stourport-on-Severn, Worcestershire, England, UK.
fullText: Dragon Roller Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Pinfari currently located at Treasure Island Amusement Park in Stourport-on-Severn, Worcestershire, England, UK.
